name: spotify-daily-mix
description: Build a daily mix playlist from recently played and short-term top tracks — combines and deduplicates both sources server-side. Use for tasks like 'update my Daily Mix playlist' or 'refresh my daily mix'. Pass playlist_name to create or update the playlist in one step.

input.description: All parameters are optional. playlist_name triggers automatic upsert.

playlist_name.description: If set, upserts the mix into this playlist (creates if new, replaces tracks if existing OAP-managed playlist)

output.description: If playlist_name set: {playlist_id, playlist_name, created, track_count}. Otherwise: {tracks: [{uri, name, artists}], total_combined, track_count}.
